extortion.description: [AI generated] Westwing Home & Living is a European e-commerce company, headquartered in Munich, Germany. It offers an extensive collection of furnishings and home décor. Westwing operates on a membership model, offering interior design inspiration, lifestyle articles, and select sales on home essentials. The company operates in 11 European countries, providing a curated, hand-picked selection of brands and products across various price points.
